creator: kostikbel@gmail.com
text:
I have installed postgresql-server-8.2.0. Now, build of INDEX by portsdb -Uu
fails:

Updating the ports index ... Generating INDEX.tmp - please wait..erserver-1.2_3: "/usr/ports/databases/postgresql-server" non-existent -- dependency list incomplete
===> databases/erserver failed
*** Error code 1
1 error

The reason is that output of postmaster -V starts with "postgres" instead of
"postmaster":
% /usr/local/bin/postmaster -V
postgres (PostgreSQL) 8.2.0
